title: Afroaster peglerae
taxonomy: Afroaster peglerae is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to South Africa and is a member of the genus Afroaster. The classification of Afroaster peglerae is further supported by its characteristics, which include its leaves and inflorescence. This classification is based on the botanical and taxonomic research that has been conducted on the species. Afroaster peglerae's classification is an essential part of understanding its evolutionary history and relationships with other plant species.
